display.purpose: Large page and season titles only.

headline.purpose: Inspector titles and feature section identities.

title.purpose: Card titles, entity names, event names, and banner summaries.

body.purpose: Readable descriptions and dense product copy.

label.purpose: Controls, taxonomy, chips, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: panel-inset
shadows.purpose: Subtle top hairline on dark panels.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Large artwork cards and hoverable media surfaces.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover response for image-heavy cards only.

shadows.name: icon-drop
shadows.purpose: Emblems and meaningful art icons on dark backgrounds.

shadows.name: soft-artwork-plaque
shadows.purpose: Static title labels over banner artwork.

shadows.name: artwork-details-drawer
shadows.purpose: Readable body-copy drawers over banner artwork.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Disclosure, masthead, and larger state transitions.

motion.name: ease-soft
motion.purpose: Control borders, item reveal, and compact hover response.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Buttons, links, chips, and taxonomy hover states.

motion.name: disclosure
motion.purpose: Unknown-height expansion, drawers, and wave cards.

components.name: Season Masthead Summary
components.description: Full-bleed page context with current season, countdown, and emblem.
components.html:
Current Season

Aequor

Ends in 12d 4h
components.css: .ds-season-masthead{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr)5.6rem;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;padding:.75rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at 76% 36%,oklch(60% .085 210/.08),transparent 18rem),linear-gradient(180deg,oklch(10% .026 248/.32),transparent 72%);color:oklch(95% .035 84);font-family:'Noto Sans','Trebuchet MS',sans-serif}.ds-season-copy{min-width:0}.ds-kicker{margin:0 0 .35rem;color:oklch(77% .065 84/.72);font-size:.64rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.13em;text-transform:uppercase}.ds-season-masthead h2{margin:0;font-family:'Droid Serif',Georgia,serif;font-size:1.25rem;line-height:1.05}.ds-season-masthead p{margin:0;color:oklch(74% .032 255/.82);font-size:.64rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase}.ds-emblem{width:5.6rem;height:5.6rem;background:radial-gradient(circle,oklch(70% .08 205/.18),transparent 66%);border:1px solid oklch(74% .08 84/.18);transform:rotate(45deg)}

components.name: Timeline Filter Button
components.description: Serif selector with diamond mark for the Timeline content switcher.
components.css: .ds-timeline-filter{display:inline-flex;min-height:4.8rem;min-width:8rem;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;gap:.5rem;border:0;background:transparent;color:oklch(95% .035 84);padding:.75rem .5rem;font-family:'Droid Serif',Georgia,serif;font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;text-shadow:0 0 .7rem oklch(78% .09 84/.32);transition:color 150ms ease}.ds-timeline-filter:before{content:'';width:.52rem;height:.52rem;border:4px solid oklch(82% .12 88/.88);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(12% .025 248/.72),0 0 .85rem oklch(78% .1 84/.24);transform:rotate(45deg)}.ds-timeline-filter:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(84% .1 84/.28);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Price Segmented Toggle
components.css: .ds-price-toggle{display:inline-grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(3.85rem,1fr));border:1px solid oklch(45% .034 255/.42);background:linear-gradient(180deg,oklch(13% .028 248/.72),oklch(8% .026 248/.76));box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 oklch(93% .03 84/.04)}.ds-price-toggle button{min-height:2rem;border:0;background:transparent;color:oklch(70% .035 254/.86);padding:.5rem .65rem;font-size:.64rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase}.ds-price-toggle button+button{border-left:1px solid oklch(45% .034 255/.32)}.ds-price-toggle .is-active{background:linear-gradient(180deg,oklch(30% .075 84/.42),oklch(18% .045 84/.36));color:oklch(94% .035 84/.96);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(82% .1 84/.18),0 0 .75rem oklch(78% .1 84/.08)}.ds-price-toggle button:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(84% .1 84/.3);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: D-zone Alert Chip
components.description: Compact alert selector used inside D-zone inspector panels.
components.css: .ds-alert-chip{display:grid;min-width:2.15rem;min-height:1.75rem;place-items:center;border:1px solid oklch(72% .07 84/.24);background:oklch(7% .022 252/.58);color:oklch(83% .05 84/.92);cursor:pointer;font-family:'Droid Serif',Georgia,serif;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:800;line-height:1;padding:.28rem .48rem;transition:border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1),background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1),color 150ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1)}.ds-alert-chip:hover,.ds-alert-chip:focus-visible{border-color:oklch(82% .1 84/.62);color:oklch(96% .05 84)}.ds-alert-chip[aria-pressed='true']{border-color:oklch(84% .11 84/.68);background:oklch(20% .05 246/.78);color:oklch(97% .06 84);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(88% .08 84/.14)}.ds-alert-chip:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(84% .1 84/.38);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: D-zone Wave Card
components.description: Dense inspector row for one D-zone wave.
components.html:
1

Initial Relics

Relics and monsters share one compact inspection row.
components.css: .ds-wave-card{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2rem minmax(0,1fr);align-items:stretch;border:1px solid oklch(58% .04 232/.34);border-radius:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,oklch(14% .03 246/.28),transparent 46%),oklch(8% .023 252/.46);color:oklch(87% .028 250);transition:border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1),box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1)}.ds-wave-card:hover{border-color:oklch(82% .1 84/.58);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 oklch(88% .04 84/.06),0 .5rem 1.4rem oklch(2% .018 252/.18)}.ds-wave-index{display:grid;place-items:start center;padding-top:.75rem;color:oklch(93% .06 84);font-family:'Droid Serif',Georgia,serif;font-size:1.18rem;font-weight:800}.ds-wave-body{min-width:0;padding:.5rem .85rem .9rem}.ds-wave-body h3{margin:0;color:oklch(90% .036 84);font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase}.ds-wave-body p{margin:.45rem 0 0;color:oklch(76% .024 250/.86);font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.35}

components.name: D-zone Relic Button
components.description: Icon plus label button for relic popover entry points.
components.css: .ds-relic-button{display:grid;min-height:3.1rem;grid-template-columns:2.38rem minmax(0,1fr);align-items:center;gap:.5rem;border:1px solid oklch(58% .04 232/.34);background:linear-gradient(90deg,oklch(6.5% .02 252/.84),oklch(13% .035 246/.56));color:oklch(88% .028 250);cursor:pointer;padding:.38rem .48rem;text-align:left;transition:border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1),background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1)}.ds-relic-button:hover,.ds-relic-button:focus-visible{border-color:oklch(82% .1 84/.58);background-color:oklch(16% .034 246/.72)}.ds-relic-button:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(84% .1 84/.62);outline-offset:-2px}.ds-relic-icon{display:grid;width:2.25rem;height:2.25rem;place-items:center;background:oklch(4.5% .018 252/.86);color:oklch(70% .03 250/.72);font-family:'Droid Serif',Georgia,serif}.ds-relic-button span:last-child{overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;color:oklch(93% .034 84);font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500}

components.name: Timeline Event Row
components.description: Compact row card with optional art slice and taxonomy line.
components.html:
Event Title

Gameplay Event · Featured Unit · Prime
components.css: .ds-event-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:6rem minmax(0,1fr);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(51,65,85,.4);background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(15,23,42,.78),rgba(10,16,28,.88));transition:border-color 150ms ease;color:oklch(91% .025 255)}.ds-event-row:hover{border-color:rgba(253,230,138,.3)}.ds-event-art{min-height:8rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,oklch(20% .04 236),oklch(5% .018 252));border-right:1px solid rgba(51,65,85,.3)}.ds-event-copy{min-width:0;padding:.75rem 1rem}.ds-event-copy h3{margin:0;color:oklch(95% .035 84/.9);font-family:'Droid Serif',Georgia,serif;font-size:.98rem;line-height:1.16}.ds-event-copy p{margin:.4rem 0 0;color:oklch(77% .078 83/.88);font-size:.64rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.11em;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}

components.name: Banner Static Title Plaque
components.description: Soft text-on-art plaque for collapsed banner summaries.
components.html:
Fata Texunt / Sempiternal Web

New Awakener

Ends in 13h 25m
components.css: .ds-banner-plaque{display:inline-grid;min-width:8.75rem;max-width:min(28rem,calc(100vw - 3rem));border:1px solid rgba(255,244,202,.12);background:rgba(2,6,23,.28);padding:.5rem .75rem;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(2,6,14,.34),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,244,202,.04);backdrop-filter:blur(2px);color:oklch(95% .035 84)}.ds-banner-plaque h3{margin:0 0 -.14em;padding-bottom:.14em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-family:'Droid Serif',Georgia,serif;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.12;color:oklch(95% .035 84);text-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.9)}.ds-banner-plaque p,.ds-banner-plaque span{margin:.375rem 0 0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-size:.56rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.14em;line-height:1;text-transform:uppercase;text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.92)}.ds-banner-plaque p{color:oklch(78% .1 84)}.ds-banner-plaque span{color:oklch(74% .032 255/.9)}

components.name: Banner Details Drawer
components.description: Stronger text-on-art drawer for readable banner details.
components.html:
Fata Texunt / Sempiternal Web

New Awakener

Featured rate-up banners for Arachne and her SSR Wheel.

components.name: Database Filter Chip
components.description: Existing database browse chip vocabulary to preserve until redesign.

narrative.overview:
SKeyDB should feel like a maintained game archive that has learned the habits of a serious tool. The page is dark, compact, and information-dense, but it keeps enough amber serif hierarchy, realm aura, and artwork to remind users that this is Morimens knowledge, not a generic admin dashboard.

The current visual canon is the Timeline and D-zone facelift. They use shallow mastheads, sharp panels, low-radius controls, restrained glow, compact labels, contextual art as supporting evidence, and careful text-on-art overlays where blur earns its keep. Builder and Collection redesigns should move toward this language while respecting their heavier interaction needs.

This system rejects generic SaaS cards, bare wiki pages, flashy game portals, purple-blue AI gradients, default glass panels, and mismatched component vocabularies. If a page starts to look like every control came from a different project, it has drifted.
keyCharacteristics: Dark blue-slate surfaces with amber-gold state and identity.
Serif names and season titles paired with dense sans controls and metadata.
Sharp 2-3 px product geometry, with rounded pills reserved for legacy surfaces until redesigned.
Art and realm color appear as contextual tints, not decoration.
Translucent blur is allowed for text on artwork, with soft blur for title plaques and stronger blur for body-copy drawers.
Motion is short, stateful, and disabled for reduced-motion users.

rules.name: The Amber Means State Rule
rules.body: Amber must mark active selection, current identity, focus, or important headings. It is not filler decoration.

rules.name: The Realm Aura Rule
rules.body: Realm colors tint headers, art, badges, and card borders locally. They do not replace the product palette globally.

rules.name: The Earned Serif Rule
rules.body: Use Droid Serif for names, seasons, event titles, and page identity only when the game texture helps. Do not use it for stats, controls, descriptions, taxonomy, prices, or dense data.

rules.name: The Sans Data Rule
rules.body: Stats, prices, counts, and compact metadata stay sans, medium-to-heavy, and tabular when alignment matters.

rules.name: The Flat Until Asked Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat unless hover, focus, expansion, or stacked artwork needs depth.

rules.name: The Text-on-Art Blur Rule
rules.body: Blur is allowed when text sits on artwork and needs legibility. Use the least blur that solves the reading problem: soft plaque for titles, stronger drawer for body copy.

rules.name: The No Decorative Glass Rule
rules.body: Blur may support text-on-art overlays and masthead/header readability. It is not a default panel material.

dos: Do use Timeline and D-zone as the current visual canon for new product-surface redesigns.
Do keep page sections flowing on the app background unless the section is a real interactive tool.
Do use amber for active state, focus, current identity, and key headings.
Do keep product corners sharp at 2-3 px.
Do use Droid Serif only where it visually earns the game-texture role, then switch to sans for controls, metadata, descriptions, and data.
Do use soft or strong blur overlays when text sits on artwork and would otherwise lose contrast.
Do respect reduced motion and keep transitions in the 150-230 ms range.
Do preserve /database chip and card conventions until that surface is intentionally redesigned.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboards with rounded cards, oversized hero stats, and abstract gradients.
Don't use bare wiki pages where everything has the same text weight and no interaction hierarchy.
Don't use flashy game portal layouts that make data harder to compare.
Don't use nested card stacks or wrap every page section in a decorative card.
Don't use purple-blue AI gradients, default glass panels, or decorative glow without state or content meaning.
Don't mix database chips, builder ownership pills, and Timeline selectors as if they were one interchangeable component.
Don't use Timeline banner blur treatments as ordinary panel styling away from artwork.
Don't spam Droid Serif across every label, control, or description.
Don't use a colored border-left or border-right thicker than 1 px as a card accent.
